name: naiveproxy
note: Apache-2.0. NaiveProxy is the anti-tracking architecture this server speaks. v0.3.0+: the server-side proxy is the upstream klzgrad/naiveproxy `naive` Linux binary running inside the ct-naive container (docker/naive/Dockerfile); the client-side binary bundled in the panel image (docker/panel/Dockerfile) is the SAME upstream build, version-pinned in lockstep via manifests/naive.upstream.json. That single-source-of-truth pin is the v0.3.0 architecture's anti-drift guarantee — operator/sync-naive-pin.ts (wired into `ct update` preflight and `make check-naive-pin`) refuses to rebuild on divergence. The verify probe execs `naive --version` inside the ct-naive container, confirming the server-side binary is alive and the supervisor has spawned it. Cross-checked at runtime by `ct version-bridge`, which compares this binary's reported version against the client-side binary in panel — drift fails the bridge with a remediation hint. (v0.3.0 — replaced the pre-v0.3 sing-box grep verify; sing-box was retired in v0.2.0.)
